description: Geo Market Watch v5.5 — Minimal Agent Configuration Example
notes: This is an example configuration for running the minimal agent loop.
Copy this file and modify paths for your use case.
The agent loop can be invoked via CLI or imported as a module.
No external services or APIs are required.
programmatic_example: from engine.agent_loop import run_agent_loop; summary = run_agent_loop('data/intake-sample.json', 'data/dedupe-memory.json', 'outputs/')
